# tetris

## Methodology

Default methodology: `ralph`

- Agent: `claude`
- Max iterations: 25

## Guardrails

- Max function lines: 50
- Max file lines: 300
- Tests required: true

## Layout

- `.samuel/tasks/` — PRDs and task lists
- `.samuel/builtins/` — framework built-in skills (do not edit)
- `.samuel/plugins/` — local plugin manifests

## Commands

- `samuel sync` — refresh per-folder AGENTS.md
- `samuel doctor` — verify framework + plugin health
- `samuel init` — re-run with --force to refresh defaults
